name: What's the time limit to report ladder fall injury from work?
description: 30 days max in UT/ID, but report today to protect your claim.

mainEntity.name: What's the time limit to report ladder fall injury from work?

acceptedAnswer.text: 30 days max in UT/ID, but report today to protect your claim.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Report within 30 days in Utah/Idaho; ideally immediately to avoid denial.**

Late reports risk claim rejection unless good cause shown, like delayed symptoms. Statutes start from injury date.

- Utah: 180 days max for filing, but prompt notice key.[1]
- Idaho: 1 year, but employer must know soon.
- Document everything from day one.

Notify supervisor/HR in writing today. Missing deadlines forfeits benefits.
